requirement_topic.en: CE-Aligned Electrical Safety and BESS Battery Standards
requirement_topic.zh: CE对应电气安全与BESS电池标准
requirement_topic.zht: CE對應電氣安全與BESS電池標準

summary.en: Albania follows CE-oriented requirements for in-scope electrical equipment through EU candidate alignment and local implementation. For lithium-ion BESS, TS EN IEC 62619 is commonly used as the battery safety evidence route, and IEC 62933-5-2 is commonly used as the system-safety reference for grid-integrated installations. China evidence should be mapped to Albania-facing EN/IECEE and project documentation paths before shipment.
summary.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚作为欧盟候选国，针对适用范围内电气设备采用CE方向要求的实现框架。对于锂离子BESS，通常以 TS EN IEC 62619 作为电池安全证据路径，IEC 62933-5-2 常被用于并网型储能系统的系统安全参考。出口前应将中国证据映射到阿尔巴尼亚面向的EN/IECEE和项目文件路径。
summary.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞作為歐盟候選國，針對適用範圍內電氣設備採用CE方向要求的落實框架。對於鋰離子 BESS，通常以 TS EN IEC 62619 作為電池安全證據路徑，IEC 62933-5-2 常被用作並網型儲能設備的系統安全參考。出貨前應將中國證據映射到阿爾巴尼亞面向的 EN/IECEE 及項目文件路徑。

standards_or_laws: Albania CE-oriented electrical safety implementation under DPS and sector alignment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558 for stationary energy storage safety and system integration. These standards are useful for technical comparison but do not replace Albania-facing TS EN and market-entry evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558开展储能安全及并网技术管理。这些标准可用于技术对照，但不能替代面向阿尔巴尼亚的TS EN和入市证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558開展儲能安全及並網技術管理。這些標準可用於技術對照，但不能取代面向阿爾巴尼亞的 TS EN 和入市證據。

gap.en: A Chinese GB report is not the same as an Albania-facing technical file. Exporters should prepare EN/IEC-aligned evidence for applicable voltage classes, thermal and residual safety parameters, grid-code interface conditions, Albania project-specific documentation routes, English and Albanian risk documentation, and declaration-of-conformance controls.
gap.zh: 中国GB报告不等同于面向阿尔巴尼亚的技术文件。出口商应按适用电压级别、热与剩余安全参数、并网接口条件、阿尔巴尼亚项目路径、英阿双语风险文件和符合性声明控制准备EN/IEC证据。
gap.zht: 中國GB報告不等同於面向阿爾巴尼亞的技術文件。出口商應按適用電壓級別、熱與殘餘安全參數、併網介面條件、阿爾巴尼亞項目路徑、英阿雙語風險文件和符合性聲明控制準備EN/IEC證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope electrical equipment under Albania CE-oriented rules; TS EN IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 are standards-based safety evidence unless a cited Albanian rule, tender, insurer, or project contract makes them mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for in-scope electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries in China; GB/T baselines are not direct Albania substitutes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat Chinese GB battery safety evidence as a substitute for Albania-facing compliance. Build an Albania technical file around EN/IEC evidence and project-specific ERE / OST acceptance requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB电池安全证据视为阿尔巴尼亚合规替代。应以EN/IEC证据和项目特定ERE/OST验收要求建立阿尔巴尼亚技术文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB電池安全證據視為阿爾巴尼亞合規替代。應以 EN/IEC 證據和項目特定 ERE / OST 驗收要求建立阿爾巴尼亞技術文件。
